mnemonics.title: Consensus Algorithms
mnemonics.content: PoW: Power Wasteful, PoS: People's Stake, PBFT: Please Be Faithful Together

acronyms.usage: Light clients verify transactions without full blockchain

visualTips.visualization: Imagine upside-down tree with transactions as leaves and hashes branching upward

analogies.analogy: Like a community-maintained Google Sheet where everyone verifies each edit
